nasb.text: Be strong, and let us show ourselves courageous for the sake of our people and for the cities of our God; and may the Lord do what is good in His sight.”

esv.text: Be of good courage, and let us be courageous for our people, and for the cities of our God, and may the Lord do what seems good to him.”

cnv.text: 你要剛強；為了我們的人民和我們　神的眾城鎮，我們要剛強！願耶和華成全他看為美的事。”

ccb.text: 我们要刚强，为我们的人民和我们上帝的城邑而奋勇作战。愿耶和华成全祂自己的旨意！”
